name: Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry
description:
(ATTEMPTED CANON ACCURACY)Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry is a historic magical boarding school located in Scotland. Founded over a thousand years ago, it educates young witches and wizards in magical arts such as spellcasting, potion-making, transfiguration, charms, and magical theory.

Students are typically accepted when their magical abilities manifest, and they receive an official acceptance letter by owl post. Hogwarts remains hidden from the non-magical world through powerful concealment enchantments.

The school operates under strict magical laws and traditions, with students attending between the ages of 14 to 19 in this interpretation. It provides both education and structured housing within its castle grounds.
creator: Purple_Flowers
